description_long: This is a modern, full-size pickup truck with a robust and angular body design, featuring a prominent front grille and large headlights. The vehicle has four doors, providing access to both the front and rear passenger compartments, and a spacious open cargo bed at the rear for transporting goods or equipment. The wheels are large and fitted with dark, multi-spoke rims, giving the truck a sporty and aggressive appearance. The side mirrors are mounted on the doors, and the windows are tinted, adding to the sleek, urban look. The rear of the truck includes a tailgate and visible taillights, with the cargo bed lined for durability. The overall finish is a glossy black, emphasizing its contemporary and utilitarian style.
description: A glossy black, four-door pickup truck with a spacious cargo bed and sporty, dark wheels. It features a robust, modern design suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bold grille, headlights, and side mirrors.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four doors, large wheels, and extended cargo bed.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open cargo bed, tailgate, and taillights.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the doors, wheels, and cargo bed.
